records.name: P
records.description: Private Venture Reddit GEO/LLM Agency for B2B SaaS ($1M-$10M ARR). Monthly Financials: • Revenue: $50,000 MRR • Costs: ~$13k (Reddit fees + Account Manager + Writer) • Net Profit: ~$37,000/mo (75% Margin as Owner-Operator). Growth: 100% Inbound & Referrals. We have ZERO sales process (no follow-ups), offering huge upside for a commercial buyer to close our ignored leads. Deal: Asking $500K and open with Seller Financing as we trust the growth of the next months with the right buyer.

warnings: TrustMRR data is external and directional; treat listed MRR as reported/listed, not audited financial truth.
